title: JambonzAudioManager Methods
description: Methods for audio device management. Web: full device enumeration and output switching. React Native: speaker/earpiece toggle only.

enumerateDevices.description: List all available audio devices (microphones and speakers).

setOutputDevice.description: Set the audio output device. Web: pass a deviceId from getSpeakers(). React Native: pass 'speaker' or 'earpiece'. Returns false if not supported.
